creator: kamikaze@bsdforen.de
text:
Patch is outdated, here is a new one.

Also the time for a timeout has long passed.



diff -Nur ports/textproc/dblatex.orig/Makefile ports/textproc/dblatex/Makefile
--- ports/textproc/dblatex.orig/Makefile	2009-09-03 13:45:23.000000000 +0200
+++ ports/textproc/dblatex/Makefile	2009-09-03 13:46:18.000000000 +0200
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	dblatex
-PORTVERSION=	0.2.9
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	0.2.12
 CATEGORIES=	textproc
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
 
diff -Nur ports/textproc/dblatex.orig/distinfo ports/textproc/dblatex/distinfo
--- ports/textproc/dblatex.orig/distinfo	2009-09-03 13:45:23.000000000 +0200
+++ ports/textproc/dblatex/distinfo	2009-09-03 13:50:53.000000000 +0200

-SIZE (dblatex-0.2.9.tar.bz2) = 696288
